qa_pairs.question: Why are limits on the maximum number of file changes per user necessary?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of file changes everyday by a user is needed to prevent individual user backups from becoming bottlenecks for the whole backup processes.

qa_pairs.question: Which version of a file is always retained in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: The most recent version of a file is always kept in TSM /project backup.

qa_pairs.question: How many inactive versions of files are kept in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: One inactive version of files (a second copy) is kept in TSM /project backup.

qa_pairs.question: What is the retention period for inactive versions of files in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: Inactive versions of files are kept for 60 days in TSM /project backup.

qa_pairs.question: How many deleted versions of files are kept in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: One deleted version of files is kept in TSM /project backup.

qa_pairs.question: For how long are deleted versions of files retained in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: Deleted versions of files are kept for 60 days in TSM /project backup.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of file changes allowed per day for every project in TSM /project backup?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of file changes per day by every project in TSM /project backup is 50,000 files.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default archival allocation per project in TSM /project archival?
qa_pairs.answer: The default archival allocation per project in TSM /project archival is 10 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum time an archive is kept in TSM /project archival?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum time to keep an archive in TSM /project archival is 1 year.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of files that can be archived per project in TSM /project archival?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of files to be archived in TSM /project archival is 50,000 files.

qa_pairs.question: How many copies of archived files are kept in TSM /project archival?
qa_pairs.answer: One copy of archived files is kept in TSM /project archival.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum number of files that can be restored per project per day in TSM /project restore?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum number of files to be restored per project per day in TSM /project restore is 50,000 files.

qa_pairs.question: What is the maximum restore size allowed per day for TSM /project restore?
qa_pairs.answer: The maximum restore size per day for TSM /project restore is 10 TB.
